body:
This Mod adds custom op items and more

The Commands are 

/give @s ich:[and you will see the Itens





Super Dimension Mod – Official Description

The Super Dimension Mod adds a brand-new endgame dimension to Minecraft, designed for players who are looking for extreme progression, powerful blocks, and unique crafting mechanics.

The mod introduces the Super Dimension, a special and exclusive world that can only be accessed using Super OP Blocks. These blocks are not obtainable in the Overworld or any other vanilla dimension.

Super OP Blocks can only be obtained from the Super OP Biome, which exists exclusively inside the Super Dimension. These blocks cannot be acquired by normal gameplay methods. The only alternative way to access the dimension is by building a Super Portal using Super Boxes and OP Dimension Blocks.

Inside the Super Dimension you will find diamond blocks naturally generating in caves and underground cave systems, offering a highly rewarding exploration experience.

The mod adds multiple new crafting recipes that allow players to create powerful items, special blocks, and advanced components related to the Super Dimension.

For testing or creative gameplay, all mod items are available in the Creative Mode inventory. Alternatively, items can also be obtained using commands listed below.

The main focus of this mod is to expand the endgame with a final high-risk, high-reward dimension, introduce unique overpowered mechanics, and provide fresh exploration and crafting content beyond vanilla limits.
